stemHtml: What should an aeroplane have to conduct parallel approaches?

options.a: Non-precision approach capabilities, or meet the eligibility of MLS capabilities.
options.b: Precision approach capabilities, or meet the eligibility of PBN capabilities.
options.c: Non-precision approach capabilities, or meet the eligibility of PBN capabilities.
options.d: Precision approach capabilities, or meet the eligibility of VOR capabilities.
